<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Http\Client\Common\Exception; use Http\Client\Exception\TransferException; use Psr\Http\Message\RequestInterface; /** * Thrown when a http client match in the HTTPClientRouter. * * @author Tobias Nyholm <tobias.nyholm@gmail.com> */ final class HttpClientNoMatchException extends TransferException { /** * @var RequestInterface */ private $request; public function __construct(string $message, RequestInterface $request, ?\Exception $previous = null) { $this->request = $request; parent::__construct($message, 0, $previous); } public function getRequest(): RequestInterface { return $this->request; } }
